testcase.name: test_grid_cell_shows_explicit_ot_pair

failure.message:
AssertionError: out expected 19:58, got 07:58 — cell={'in': '08:00', 'out': '07:58', 'ot_in': '20:08', 'ot_out': '07:58', 'hours': 24.0, 'duty_hours': 8.0, 'raw_hours': 23.8, 'ot_hours': 16.0, 'punches': 4, 'sources': ['app'], 'present': 1.0, 'weekly_off': False} assert '07:58' == '19:58'
- 19:58 + 07:58

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter83b_ot_split_and_selfregister.py:190: in test_grid_cell_shows_explicit_ot_pair assert cell.get("out") == "19:58", f"out expected 19:58, got {cell.get('out')} — cell={cell!r}" E AssertionError: out expected 19:58, got 07:58 — cell={'in': '08:00', 'out': '07:58', 'ot_in': '20:08', 'ot_out': '07:58', 'hours': 24.0, 'duty_hours': 8.0, 'raw_hours': 23.8, 'ot_hours': 16.0, 'punches': 4, 'sources': ['app'], 'present': 1.0, 'weekly_off': False} E assert '07:58' == '19:58' E E - 19:58 E + 07:58

testcase.name: test_ot_report_row_cross_day
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter83b_ot_split_and_selfregister.py:215: in test_ot_report_row_cross_day assert 11.5 <= ot_hrs <= 12.2, f"ot_hours ~11.83 expected, got {ot_hrs}" E AssertionError: ot_hours ~11.83 expected, got 15.8 E assert 15.8 <= 12.2

testcase.name: test_grid_cell_regular_and_ot
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter83b_ot_split_and_selfregister.py:298: in test_grid_cell_regular_and_ot assert cell.get("out") == "16:00", cell E AssertionError: {'in': '08:00', 'out': '20:00', 'ot_in': '16:30', 'ot_out': '20:00', ...} E assert '20:00' == '16:00' E E - 16:00 E + 20:00

testcase.name: test_grid_arithmetic_split

failure.message: AssertionError: {'in': '08:00', 'out': '22:00', 'ot_in': None, 'ot_out': None, ...} assert None == '22:00' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc2639dbb380>('ot_out') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc2639dbb380> = {'in': '08:00', 'out': '22:00', 'ot_in': None, 'ot_out': None, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter83b_ot_split_and_selfregister.py:337: in test_grid_arithmetic_split assert cell.get("ot_out") == "22:00", cell E AssertionError: {'in': '08:00', 'out': '22:00', 'ot_in': None, 'ot_out': None, ...} E assert None == '22:00' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc2639dbb380>('ot_out') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc2639dbb380> = {'in': '08:00', 'out': '22:00', 'ot_in': None, 'ot_out': None, ...}.get
